title: Epic: Economy and lives
Economy/lives: centralize balance config for starting gold/lives, sell ratio, kill reward, wave reward, early bonus
description: Centralize economy and lives balance constants in shared config with typed accessors.

title: Economy/lives: add early wave start bonus placeholder
description: Add placeholder mechanism for early wave start bonus without full timing logic yet.

title: Economy/lives: create typed player resources model with gold and lives
description: Add explicit domain model and types for player gold/lives resources.

title: Economy/lives: initialize HUD values from player resources model
description: Bind HUD initial values to typed player resources model instead of hardcoded values.

title: Economy/lives: implement gold spend validation for tower placement
description: Validate player gold before tower placement using player resources model.

title: Economy/lives: subtract tower cost when tower is placed
description: Deduct tower cost from player gold after successful placement.

title: Economy/lives: add gold reward when creep is killed
description: Grant configured gold reward on creep death events.

title: Economy/lives: subtract life when creep reaches exit
description: Reduce player lives when creep escapes through exit.

title: Economy/lives: add game over state when lives reach zero
description: Transition to game over state when player lives are depleted.

title: Economy/lives: add wave completion reward
description: Grant configured reward when wave is completed.

title: Epic: Game feel & feedback
description: Improve gameplay feel and player feedback with lightweight visual/audio responses while keeping core mechanics, balance, and Phaser/React boundaries unchanged.

title: Game feel: hit feedback on creep damage
description: Add lightweight visual hit feedback when creep takes damage (flash/tint pulse) with short duration and no gameplay effect.
close_reason: Added lightweight creep hit flash/tint feedback on damage without gameplay impact

title: Game feel: death feedback on creep elimination
description: Add clear visual feedback when creep dies (simple fade-out or tiny particle burst) and clean object disposal.
close_reason: Added lightweight creep death fade-out feedback before disposal without changing death mechanics

title: Game feel: attack feedback synced with tower cooldown
description: Improve tower attack visual feedback (projectile or beam/link) and ensure timing matches attack cooldown events.
close_reason: Added lightweight beam attack feedback synced with tower attack timing and cooldown-derived fade duration

title: Game feel: optional floating damage numbers
description: Add simple optional floating damage numbers for hits; keep rendering lightweight and easy to toggle/disable.
close_reason: Added lightweight optional floating damage numbers with rise/fade animation and cleanup

title: Game feel: sound system foundation and hooks
description: Implement basic sound manager abstraction with typed hooks/events for attack, hit, and death; no real assets required yet.
close_reason: Added typed GameSoundManager foundation and attack/hit/death hooks in Phaser combat flow

title: Game feel: tower attack pulse feedback
description: Add subtle tower attack animation (small scale pulse or brief emphasis) when a tower fires, without affecting stats.
close_reason: Added subtle tower attack pulse overlay synced to each tower shot

title: Game feel: creep movement polish and speed consistency
description: Polish creep movement interpolation if needed to improve perceived smoothness while keeping existing path/speed logic.
close_reason: Polished creep movement with capped simulation delta and smoother directional orientation without speed/balance changes

title: Game feel: remove or replace dev-only visuals
description: Audit current dev-only visual overlays and replace/remove for production-facing gameplay feedback path.
close_reason: Removed dev-only visual paths and kept production-safe gameplay feedback overlays

title: Epic: Wave system
Wave system: define wave config types
description: Define strict wave configuration types for wave composition, spawn order, and timing metadata.

title: Wave system: calculate creep path once at wave start
description: Compute path for creeps once at wave start using current grid/pathfinding state and attach to creep runtime data.

title: Wave system: add wave phase state (build/wave/completed/game-over)
description: Add explicit wave phase state machine values: build, wave, completed, game-over.

title: Wave system: implement wave start action
description: Implement action to start wave and transition phase state from build to wave when preconditions are met.

title: Wave system: define creep entity types
description: Define strict creep entity types including id, hp, speed, state, and runtime positioning/path fields.

title: Wave system: spawn creeps from entrance
description: Spawn creeps at entrance according to active wave configuration.

title: Wave system: move creeps along path in Phaser
description: Move active creeps along their precomputed path in Phaser update loop.

title: Wave system tests: wave state transition coverage
description: Add tests for wave state transitions where feasible, including build->wave and wave->completed/game-over paths.

title: Wave system: end wave when all creeps are dead or escaped
description: End active wave and transition phase when all spawned creeps are either dead or escaped.

title: Wave system: detect creep reaching exit
description: Detect when a creep reaches exit and update creep/lives state accordingly.

title: Epic: Build phase
Build phase: define tower entity types (id, position, cost, type)
description: Define strict tower domain types including id, grid position, cost, and tower type for build-phase workflows.

title: Build phase: prevent placement when path is blocked
description: Block tower placement confirmation whenever pathfinding reports no valid entrance-to-exit path.

title: Build phase: add build mode state (selected tower type or none)
description: Introduce build mode state that stores selected tower type or none, without coupling frame updates to React runtime state.

title: Build phase: implement grid cell hover detection in Phaser
description: Detect currently hovered grid cell in Phaser scene for build interactions.

title: Build phase: add build preview colors (green valid, red invalid)
description: Render build preview feedback on hovered cells: green for valid placement and red for invalid placement.

title: Build phase: integrate pathfinding validation before placement
description: Integrate pathfinding checks into build flow before confirming placement.

title: Build phase: place tower and update grid state
description: On valid placement, create tower instance and update grid occupancy/walkability state consistently.

title: Build phase: add sell tower logic (50 percent refund)
description: Implement tower selling with 50 percent cost refund and state updates for grid and economy.

title: Build phase: deduct gold on successful placement
description: Deduct tower cost from player gold only after successful placement confirmation.

title: Build phase: disable build actions outside build phase
description: Disable placement/sell/build interactions whenever game is not in build phase.

title: Render entrance and exit cells on grid
Epic: Core gameplay loop stabilization
description: Stabilize the core playable gameplay loop for MVP: reliable wave cycle, valid phase transitions, action guards, baseline balance sanity, dev artifact isolation, Phaser runtime cleanup, and restart/reset reliability.
close_reason: All stabilization child tasks completed and validated via build/test

title: Gameplay loop: implement continuous wave cycle (start -> play -> end -> next)
description: Ensure stable repeated loop across waves with deterministic wave iteration and no manual scene re-init.

title: Gameplay loop: enforce proper build <-> wave state transitions
description: Harden wave/build phase state machine and prevent invalid intermediate states.

title: Gameplay loop: guard invalid actions during wave phase
description: Block build/sell/start actions when phase does not allow them and keep checks centralized.

title: Gameplay loop: validate baseline balance sanity (towers kill creeps, player can lose)
description: Add sanity checks/tests for minimal playable combat and defeat conditions with current balance.

title: Gameplay loop: isolate or remove dev-only gameplay artifacts
description: Move debug visuals/shortcuts behind explicit dev flags and keep production path clean.
close_reason: Isolated dev-only visual/runtime artifacts from production scene path

title: Gameplay loop: ensure Phaser runtime cleanup and no entity leak across waves
description: Guarantee proper destruction/removal of creeps, towers, projectiles, traces, listeners between cycles.
close_reason: Implemented Phaser runtime cleanup and verified build/tests

title: Gameplay loop: implement basic game restart/reset flow
description: Provide deterministic reset to initial resources, phases, entities, and wave state after game over or restart.
close_reason: Implemented deterministic run reset flow after game-over with initial state restoration

title: Install and embed Phaser into React app
Epic: HUD and mobile UI
Epic: Pathfinding
Pathfinding: implement pure BFS for 10x15 grid
description: Implement deterministic pure BFS pathfinding for the 10x15 grid model, isolated from rendering and Phaser.

title: Pathfinding: define domain types (GridPosition, PathNode, PathResult)
description: Define strict pathfinding domain types for grid-based traversal: GridPosition, PathNode, PathResult.

title: Pathfinding: return full path from entrance to exit
description: Return full ordered path nodes from entrance to exit when path exists; return no-path result otherwise.

title: Pathfinding: treat occupied and non-walkable cells as blocked
description: Ensure BFS traversal blocks cells marked occupied or non-walkable in the grid model.

title: Pathfinding: add placement validation utility
description: Add utility that validates tower placement by checking path availability after simulated placement.

title: Pathfinding debug: dev-only path rendering in Phaser
description: Add development-only path debug visualization in Phaser scene without affecting production gameplay behavior.

title: Pathfinding tests: valid path, blocked path, placement validation
description: Add Vitest unit tests for path exists case, blocked path case, and tower placement validation utility.

title: Epic: Mobile gameplay UX
description: Make mobile gameplay comfortable and playable by improving layout, input clarity, scaling, and responsiveness without changing core gameplay logic or mechanics.

title: Mobile UX: responsive game canvas scaling (fit screen without distortion)
description: Implement responsive canvas sizing strategy that maximizes usable playfield on mobile while preserving aspect ratio and avoiding distortion. Keep Phaser rendering isolated from React UI layer.
close_reason: Implemented responsive canvas fit scaling without distortion using full-width container and Phaser FIT mode

title: Mobile UX: optional camera scaling/zoom handling when needed
description: If responsive fit still leaves poor usability on target viewports, add minimal camera scale/zoom handling to improve field usability without altering core mechanics.
close_reason: Added optional responsive camera zoom/centering on scale resize to improve mobile field fit without gameplay changes

title: Mobile UX: safe area handling for notches and system insets
description: Add safe-area-aware layout padding using env(safe-area-inset-*) so HUD and controls remain accessible on modern mobile devices.
close_reason: Added safe-area-aware mobile paddings using env(safe-area-inset-*) with baseline spacing

title: Mobile UX: optimize HUD layout for compact readable mobile usage
description: Refactor HUD layout for small portrait screens (360x800 and 390x844), keeping controls readable and compact without changing gameplay logic.
close_reason: Optimized HUD mobile layout density/readability for 360x800 and 390x844 without gameplay changes

title: Mobile UX: improve touch input handling (tap, drag, optional long-press)
description: Harden touch interactions for grid/tower actions with clear gesture handling for mobile. Do not add new gameplay mechanics.
close_reason: Improved mobile touch input with tap placement, drag preview continuity, and optional long-press sell

title: Mobile UX: improve tower placement feedback (preview and valid/invalid clarity)
description: Enhance placement preview visibility and feedback contrast for valid/invalid states while preserving existing placement rules.
close_reason: Enhanced tower placement preview clarity with higher contrast fill, border, and center valid/invalid markers

title: Mobile UX: improve button interaction UX (Start Wave, Build, Sell)
description: Improve action button responsiveness and state feedback for mobile controls; keep existing action semantics unchanged.
close_reason: Improved mobile button interaction UX with explicit Build/Sell/Start controls and clearer touch/focus/disabled feedback

title: Mobile UX: improve readability (font sizes, spacing, contrast)
description: Tune typography and spacing for mobile readability and baseline accessibility contrast without redesigning game systems.
close_reason: Improved mobile readability via typography, contrast, and spacing tuning without gameplay changes

title: Mobile UX: add misclick protection to prevent accidental actions
description: Introduce lightweight safeguards against accidental taps for high-impact actions on mobile. Keep UX minimal and non-intrusive.
close_reason: Added lightweight anti-misclick guards: tap duration floor and short action cooldown for placement/sell actions

title: Mobile UX: profile mobile performance (FPS and unnecessary rerenders)
description: Measure and remove obvious mobile performance bottlenecks in UI/render pipeline, focusing on stable gameplay responsiveness.
close_reason: Added dev FPS telemetry and removed hot-path allocations in tower targeting; memoized HUD/canvas to prevent unnecessary rerenders

title: Epic: Grid system
Grid: centralize config in shared constants/enums
description: Move/normalize grid dimensions and related static values into centralized shared constants/enums as a single source of truth.

title: Grid: create pure model factory for 10x15 map
description: Implement a pure grid model factory that creates a deterministic 10x15 grid model without rendering concerns or side effects.

title: Grid: add entrance and exit coordinates to model
description: Extend grid model to include explicit entrance and exit coordinates in typed form.

title: Grid: add occupied/walkable cell state
description: Represent per-cell occupied and walkable state in the grid model with strict typing.

title: Grid render: use grid model instead of hardcoded scene values
description: Render Phaser grid from shared grid model data, removing hardcoded per-cell scene assumptions.

title: Grid debug: add dev labels/visualization for entrance and exit
description: Add debug/dev-only visualization markers for entrance and exit coordinates on the rendered grid.

title: Test setup: add unit test infrastructure for grid model
description: Set up test runner and scripts for unit tests (no gameplay tests yet), enabling follow-up grid model factory tests.

title: Epic: Towers and combat
Towers/combat: define tower combat stats (range, damage, attack cooldown)
description: Define typed combat stat model for towers in domain layer.

title: Towers/combat: add creep HP and alive/dead state contract
description: Ensure creep domain state contract supports HP updates and alive/dead transitions for combat.

title: Towers/combat: implement target detection by tower range
description: Add pure targeting logic that selects reachable creeps by tower range.

title: Towers/combat: implement tower attack cooldown
description: Add deterministic cooldown logic for tower attacks in runtime loop.

title: Towers/combat: apply damage to creeps
description: Apply tower damage to creep HP and emit resulting state transitions.

title: Towers/combat: remove dead creeps from active wave runtime
description: Remove or filter dead creeps from active wave runtime state.

title: Towers/combat: add simple projectile or dev-only attack visualization
description: Add minimal attack feedback visualization in Phaser, dev-friendly first.

title: Towers/combat: add basic Archer Tower behavior
description: Wire baseline archer behavior using targeting, cooldown, and damage.

title: Towers/combat: add tests for targeting and damage logic
description: Add unit tests for targeting rules and damage application flows where possible.

title: Epic: HUD and mobile UI
description: Implement production HUD bindings and mobile-first UI controls while keeping Phaser runtime isolated and avoiding gameplay logic changes.

title: HUD/UI: connect HUD to real game state snapshot
description: Bridge HUD to a typed game state snapshot source without frame-driven React updates.
close_reason: Connected HUD to typed game snapshot bridge and wired Start Wave command bridge to Phaser

title: HUD/UI: display real gold, lives, wave number, and phase
description: Render live economy and wave/phase fields in HUD from the snapshot contract.
close_reason: HUD now displays real gold, lives, wave number, and phase as separate live fields from typed snapshot

title: HUD/UI: implement Start Wave button interaction
description: Wire Start Wave button command from HUD through typed bridge to Phaser action handler.
close_reason: Connected Start Wave HUD command to real Phaser wave-start flow via shared scene helper

title: HUD/UI: disable Start Wave button during active wave
description: Derive Start Wave disabled state from real phase/snapshot so action is blocked in wave phase.
close_reason: Derived Start Wave disabled state explicitly from live phase and snapshot, blocking interaction during active wave

title: HUD/UI: implement tower selection buttons in HUD
description: Add HUD tower selection controls with typed selection state and command dispatch.
close_reason: Implemented HUD tower selection buttons with typed select-tower command bridge and selected state reflection

title: HUD/UI: show selected tower state in HUD
description: Display selected tower type/none state clearly in HUD with mobile-readable feedback.
close_reason: Added explicit selected tower HUD indicator backed by typed snapshot state

title: HUD/UI: add build/sell mode placeholders
description: Add explicit build/sell mode placeholders in HUD for flow clarity without adding mechanics.
close_reason: Added explicit build/sell mode placeholders in HUD with mobile-readable state labels

title: HUD/UI: keep HUD mobile-first and compact
description: Polish HUD spacing/layout for compact mobile portrait usage while preserving accessibility targets.
close_reason: Polished HUD for compact mobile portrait layouts with tighter spacing and responsive breakpoints

title: HUD/UI: add tests for HUD state mapping
description: Add tests for snapshot-to-HUD mapping and key button enabled/disabled state derivation where feasible.
close_reason: Added unit-tested HUD snapshot-to-view-model mapping for phase labels, selected tower state, mode placeholders, and Start Wave disabled derivation
